STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY INC. ALLEN, COLLEEN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, COLLEEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 525 LEAVENWORTH #12, S.F. $2,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-19-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF SHALL RETAIN ALL MONEYS HELD. JUDGMENT ALSO TO INCLUDE "SOME COSTS" AS NOTED IN THE STIPULATION.
